_notes: Source: tk-soft-patient (clinical). Target: iit-proj-patient (clinical research). Target bans name, address, and generalPractitioner for patient de-identification. Target adds mandatory research-specific extensions.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [tk-pat-1 (error: Patient must have at least a family name or a given name), tk-pat-2 (warning: Active patients should have at least one telecom)]. No equivalent in target.
New error constraint added in target: iit-pat-1 (error: Research patient must have a study identifier). Not in source.
New warning constraint added in target: iit-pat-2 (warning: Deceased patients should have a deceased date). Not in source.
Extension employeeId[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Extension preferredLanguage[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Extension ethnicGroup[0..1 mustSupport=false] present in source is removed in target.
New mandatory extension studyEnrollmentDate[1..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Clinical trial enrollment date required. Source does not define this extension.
New mandatory extension consentStatus[1..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Patient consent status required. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension studyArm[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension dataUseRestriction[0..* mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
Identifier slicing scheme changed: source defines slices [mrn, national]; target defines slices [studyId, siteId]. Discriminators and slice names differ entirely.
Source mandatory slice mrn[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in iit-proj-patient.
Source optional slice national[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in iit-proj-patient.
New mandatory slice studyId[1..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source has no studyId slice.
New optional slice siteId[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source has no siteId slice.
active cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Active becomes mandatory in iit-proj-patient.
name cardinality changed: source [1..*] → target [0..0]. Name element completely banned in target for de-identification purposes.
MustSupport removed on name and all sub-elements (name.family, name.given, name.prefix) since element is banned (max=0) in target.
telecom cardinality relaxed: source [1..5 mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and MustSupport removed.
MustSupport removed on telecom.system, telecom.value, telecom.use and all related constraints (target has no telecom constraints).
address cardinality changed: source [0..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..0]. Address element completely banned in target for de-identification.
MustSupport removed on address and all sub-elements (line, city, state, postalCode, country) since element is banned (max=0) in target.
Binding removed in target: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status); target has no maritalStatus constraint.
MustSupport removed on contact sub-elements (relationship, name, telecom) since target does not constrain contact (source mustSupport=true on sub-elements).
communication MustSupport added in target (source mustSupport=false; target mustSupport=true).

communication.language binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/languages) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages). Different value sets, same strength.
generalPractitioner cardinality changed: source [0..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..0]. Completely banned in target.
MustSupport removed on generalPractitioner (element banned, max=0) and reference target to tk-soft/Practitioner removed.
Reference target changed: source constrains to tk-soft/Organization; target constrains to iit-proj/Organization.
